_comment: Personal expiry & deadline reminders, checked once a day. Each entry: id (short unique slug, letters/digits/dashes - powers the Snooze reply button; entries without one simply get no button), name (what it is), date (YYYY-MM-DD), optional lead_days (how many days before to remind; default [90, 30, 7, 1, 0]), optional recurring ('yearly' for birthdays/anniversaries so the same date repeats every year), optional note (extra line in the push). A reminder fires once per lead day, so a single deadline produces a gentle 90-day heads-up tapering to a day-of nudge. Edit this file directly on github.com; no code change needed.

reminders.name: EXAMPLE - delete me: passport renewal
reminders.note: Replace this example with your real documents, subscriptions, and dates.

_bills_comment: Monthly utility bills, checked once a day. Each entry: id (short unique slug), name (what to pay), due_day (day of the month it is due, 1-31; days past a short month's end clamp to its last day), optional lead_days (default [5, 1] - a heads-up 5 days before and a final nudge the day before), optional note. IMPORTANT: the due_day values below are placeholders - edit them to match the due dates printed on your actual bills (github.com edit, no code change needed).

bills.name: EDEESTE electricity bill
bills.note: Pay online at oficinavirtual.edeeste.com.do or via banking app.

bills.name: CAASD water bill (agua)
bills.note: Pay at oficinavirtual.caasd.gob.do or via banking app.

bills.name: Internet/cable bill
bills.note: Adjust due_day to your provider's billing date, or delete this entry if autopay covers it.
